headline: Assessing SLB (NYSE:SLB) Valuation After New AI And Subsea Collaboration Wins
summary: SLB (SLB) is back in focus after a series of new collaborations, including an AI driven production optimization project in Bahrain and fresh subsea agreements tied to Suriname and the Gulf of America. See our latest analysis for SLB. These new AI and subsea projects arrive while momentum in SLB’s share price has been firm, with a 16.6% 1 month share price return and 30.4% year to date, alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 58.2% and a 5 year total shareholder return of 127.1%.
